name: proc_creation_win_hktl_invoke_obfuscation_via_use_mhsta
raw_query: any where process.command_line:"*set*" and process.command_line:"*&&*" and process.command_line:"*mshta*" and process.command_line:"*vbscript:createobject*" and process.command_line:"*.run*" and process.command_line:"*(window.close)*"
